_note: Structured disclosure of every remote / cloud API call this project makes, per the QVAC hackathon rules. Required even when the answer is 'none'.

aiInference.note: All AI inference (embeddings, RAG retrieval, and MedGemma text generation) runs on-device via the QVAC SDK, or is delegated peer-to-peer to another user-owned device over the Hyperswarm DHT. No cloud AI API (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, etc.) is ever called.

modelAssetDownload.mechanism: QVAC P2P model registry (Hyperswarm / Hyperdrive) with HTTP blob fallback
modelAssetDownload.note: Model weights are fetched ONCE on first run and cached at ~/.qvac/models. This is a one-time asset download, not inference, and is explicitly permitted by the rules. Disclosed here for full transparency. After the first run the app works fully offline (airplane mode).
